mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry_product(user_id, company_no, product_no, inquiry_title, inquiry_contents, inquiry_ans) VALUES(null, #{userId}, #{companyNo}, #{productNo}, #{inquiryTitle}, #{inquiryContents}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT ip.inquiry_no, ip.user_id, ip.product_no, ip.inquiry_title, ip.inquiry_contents, p.product_name, p.product_details, p.img_url, p.pro_type, p.tag, p.original_price, p.deposit, c.company_no, c.com_name, c.com_intro, ip.inquiry_ans FROM inquiry_product ip LEFT JOIN product p ON ip.product_no = p.product_no LEFT JOIN company c ON p.company_no = c.company_no WHERE c.company_no = ( SELECT c1.company_no FROM company c1 WHERE c1.user_id = #{userId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry_product_answer(inquiry_no, answer_contents, ans_user_id) VALUES(null, #{inquiryNo}, #{answerContents}, #{ansUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT ip.inquiry_no, ip.inquiry_ans, ipa.answer_no, ipa.answer_contents, ipa.ans_user_id FROM inquiry_product ip LEFT JOIN inquiry_product_answer ipa ON ip.inquiry_no = ipa.inquiry_no WHERE ip.inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}

SELECT ip.inquiry_no, p.product_no, ip.inquiry_title, ip.inquiry_contents, ip.inquiry_ans, p.product_name, p.product_details, p.original_price, p.is_active, p.img_url FROM inquiry_product ip LEFT JOIN product p ON ip.product_no = p.product_no WHERE ip.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ip.inquiry_no, c.user_id, ipa.answer_contents FROM inquiry_product ip LEFT JOIN company c ON ip.company_no = c.company_no LEFT JOIN inquiry_product_answer ipa ON ip.inquiry_no = ipa.inquiry_no WHERE ip.inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}
